dungeon: Realm World Boss — Nyx of Fire (the 'Demon Lady')
source: aced.gg dev blog 2021-01-10 (design) + 2021-01-17 (fight preview, Miniguy) — DOCUMENTED
map: Realm WORLD BOSS (spawns in the realm). During the fight the WORLD TRANSFORMS (a fire/demon transformation of the area).

bosses.name: Nyx of Fire
phases: EVIL PLAYER PHASE — Nyx recruits/mind-controls a real player to fight FOR her against the group
clone phase (a clone jumps in from the left, using a new projectile-pathing system)

mechanics: DOCUMENTED (dev blog): Nyx of Fire is a fire/demon WORLD BOSS. Signature mechanic = 'EVIL PLAYER PHASE' — she recruits a player to fight on her side (mind-control/turn a player against the group). The WORLD visually transforms during the fight. Uses a new projectile-pathing system (clone jumps in from the left) — the same pathing system used in the Gate-to-the-Underworld lord fight. Same designer (Shmitty) also did ToDD, Soul Harvest, Legendary/Primal items. NOTE: ACED's later build was a UNITY port (our base is the Flash X3.1.1 client).
uncertain: Exact bullet patterns/timings, minion names, drops, and how the 'evil player phase' is implemented mechanically not fully specified. Raw text: docs/aced-blog/nyx-of-fire.txt + demon-lady-design.txt.
confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH for fight concept (evil-player phase + world transform + clone, DOCUMENTED); LOW for exact patterns/drops.
